title: Tangy Flaky Light Russian Chocolate Crumble
description: A tangy and flaky vegan dessert featuring light chocolate chips and a crispy exterior, perfect for any sweet craving.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine vegan butter, vanilla extract, and light brown sugar until creamy.
Gradually add in all-purpose flour, stirring until you get a dough-like consistency.
Fold in chocolate chips and cocoa powder. Mix well but avoid overworking the mixture to maintain its light texture.
Press half of the dough into an 8x8 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray or non-stick spray.
Sprinkle remaining mixture on top for added crunch, pressing down slightly.
Bake for about 20-25 minutes until edges are golden brown and center is firm to the touch.
Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
